summary: Schedule interview event and notify participants
description: Schedule interview event and notify participants. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/interview/events/{id}/schedule. Required parameters: id, company_id. Optional parameters include candidate_email, notify_config, reminders, notify_candidate, notify_interviewers, grant_access, candidate_message, interviewers_message.

params.name: candidate_email
params.description: Candidate email which will be used for reminders. Need to match candidate email

params.name: grant_access
params.description: Array of admin_id (integer) & placement_id/offer_id/talent_pool_id (integer; based on access type to be granted)

params.name: candidate_message
params.description: Message to candidate (parameters: subject, body_html, to, attachments)

params.name: interviewers_message
params.description: Message to interviewers (parameters: subject, body_html, to, cc, bcc, attachments)
